title: liatris × steelei
intro: Liatris × steelei, also known as the hybrid gayfeather, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Liatris genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Liatris × steelei include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of Liatris × steelei can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
